```{=html}
<div style="width:78%;margin:0 auto;text-align:left;">

 <div style="background:rgba(123,181,240,0.08);border-left:5px solid #7BB5F0;border-radius:0 14px 14px 0;padding:1.3em 1.6em 1.4em;">

  <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#7BB5F0;letter-spacing:0.2em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:0.5em;">— practice 02 —</div>

  <div style="font-size:1.2em;font-weight:800;color:#F8F7F0;line-height:1.15;margin-bottom:0.95em;letter-spacing:-0.01em;">
   Install all three tools.
  </div>

  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:0.55em;">

   <div style="background:rgba(248,247,240,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(123,181,240,0.2);border-radius:10px;padding:0.7em 0.8em;">
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#7BB5F0;letter-spacing:0.14em;margin-bottom:0.35em;">CLAUDE CODE</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#F8F7F0;line-height:1.45;">→ <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.95em;color:#7BB5F0;">claude</code> runs in terminal</div>
   </div>

   <div style="background:rgba(248,247,240,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(123,181,240,0.2);border-radius:10px;padding:0.7em 0.8em;">
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#7BB5F0;letter-spacing:0.14em;margin-bottom:0.35em;">POSITRON</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#F8F7F0;line-height:1.45;">→ launches and opens</div>
   </div>

   <div style="background:rgba(248,247,240,0.04);border:1px solid rgba(123,181,240,0.2);border-radius:10px;padding:0.7em 0.8em;">
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#7BB5F0;letter-spacing:0.14em;margin-bottom:0.35em;">SPOKENLY</div>
    <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#F8F7F0;line-height:1.45;">→ hotkey produces text</div>
   </div>

  </div>

  <div style="margin-top:1em;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.12em;">
   ⏱ ~ 5 min &nbsp;·&nbsp; raise hand if stuck
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
